content:
Hey, so I came back after the saya collab announcement, rolled here and there during the daily banners and spent on a few packs.

I was focusing on GHelot, but I got Mouchette from the paid banner along with her Wheel at E2.

Any units I should look forward to from the daily rotation? I was thinking of going for Castor and Pollux, but dunno what other teams and important awakeners wheels I should be aware of.

Already got 1 Saya wheel jic just for the effect.

Hiii joined the game today for Saya and I am struggling with figuring out which units are useful / who should be prioritized / so on so forth. I am slightly familiar with some of the things through playing genshin in the past but outside of that everything is confusing to me . Any help is appreciated :^)
+guides

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

I mean from what I know from experience Aequor isn't a bad realm to invest in because it can carry you through the story pretty well I'd say. 
It is important to get through the story because you want to unlock the different Covenants to farm em - basically the equivalent to relics in genshin i believe. So i would get on that like soon if i were you
There are also youtube vids that are pretty good regarding team comp and all the different characters going into details and such
Just started and wondered what is the best team I can make with my current awakeners?
also current wheels
also have these to use if I know what to use them for

example team is saya daffodil aigis xu
if you get e1 horla she can replace aigis

I would like to recommend this team and setup for Arc1 story mode.
it is simple to navigate and not time consuming. 

Combo - you stack Xu debuff on enemies as much as you can with her Exalt and choose left option
or her 2 mana cost card (read it a bit how to trigger it)

Once you stack enough debuff on enemies, use 0 mana cost card from Saya and  in the same turn use Xu exalt then choose option on the right. everything should be clear by then.

Lily is for survivalability and some dmg,  while Ramona provide key flare and card search.

Those R rarity wheel of destiny is to increase smoothness of your gameplay during Arc1.

for posses, choose what you feel fit for yourself.
first let me tell you my opinion on flares
flares is not a good source of advice
his takes are about as accurate as background noise
you can find my opinion on vortice in my new player handbook

yah he seems to be kinda anergy and thinks he's to only right person thank you for being so helpful you da best
if you want stall, pull blue
yea first battle is always the hardest
in faded legacy you can run Epiphany or Favor to get more keyflare/aliemus at the start of the fight
you can stall ch8 and ch9 quite comfortably with aequor/caro
for your account you can run like salvador xu and it will be easy street
yeeah hoping i get him some day cuz i lost the banner
ima pu ll blue then
ty
